Title: Unsolicited Visitor
Description: Arrived uninvited. Ignored Area 51 warnings. Currently on 14 different government watchlists and 3 Discord servers. +50 to 'Probing Questions.'

Title: The DeGen Primate
Description: +50 to 'HODL Strength.' -30 to 'Exit Strategy.' Communicates through chest beating and chart emojis. Lost house in 2022.

Title: Factory Settings
Description: No lore. No backstory. No personality. He is the default. The control variable. The mayo sandwich of NFT characters. Still costs the same as the others.

Title: The Original VC
Description: Turned to the dark side for better tokenomics. Now manages a portfolio of star destroyers and questionable altcoins. 'I am your liquidity.'

Title: Not Like Other Bros
Description: +20 to 'Individuality.' Reads Nietzsche. Has strong opinions about coffee. Owns one vinyl record and mentions it constantly. Is still just a bro.

Title: Ancient HODLR
Description: Has been holding since 3000 BC. Never sold. Bandages hide the emotional damage. Portfolio is mummified too — preserved, dead, and surrounded by traps.

Title: Grakar the Filthy.
Description: High 'Strength' and 'Leadership' over lesser goblinoids. Communicates primarily through roars and pointing at things he wants to smash.

Title: Cotton Candy Menace
Description: +15 to 'Looking Unthreatening.' -40 to 'Being Taken Seriously.' Everyone underestimates him. That's been their mistake every single time.

Title: Dwayne "the rock" Johnson
Description: Immune to all expectations. May or may not be sentient. Definitely got you to spend ETH on a rock. Again.

Title: Automation Anxiety
Description: 100% machine. 0% work ethic. Currently replacing three white-collar jobs. Has no feelings about this. Will have no feelings about anything. Ever.

Title: The Yield Farmer
Description: +666 to 'Temptation.' Offers tempting deals for temporary stat boosts. Side effects include eternal damnation and mild FOMO.

Title: Schrödinger's Chad
Description: His power level exists in quantum superposition until observed. Either god-tier or complete trash. The ultimate flex is never revealing which.

Title: He Who Must Not Be Rugged
Description: Name cannot be said aloud or the floor price drops. Has seven horcruxes — all of them are locked in a multisig wallet he lost the keys to.

Title: The "Monday Morning" Mascot
Description: Still showing up. Technically. Functioning on zero sleep and negative morale. Not dead, just extremely unwell. Relatable.

Title: The Edgelord's Classic
Description: Specifically designed to protect you from mainstream opinions and bright colors.

Title: The Marshmallow Man
Description: +20 to 'Looking Inflatable.' So puffy you can't put your arms down. Fashion or sleeping bag? Scientists baffled.

Title: The Inventory Jacket
Description: Has pockets. So many pockets. Nobody knows what's in them. Possibly everything. Possibly nothing. The jacket knows.

Title: Edam If You Do
Description: Slowly regenerates health when near a cheese wheel. Requires frequent washing.

Title: PETA's Public Enemy
Description: +15 to 'Cold Resistance' and 'Luxury'. Attracts environmentalists and fashion critics.

Title: The Trophy Drip
Description: +50 to 'Audacity.' Impossible to ignore. Impossible to compliment sincerely. Screams 'I won something once.' The jacket IS the personality.

Title: The 50 Shades of "Meh"
Description: +0 to everything. The color of giving up. The shade of surrender. Visual representation of meh.

Title: Neckbeard's Natural Habitat
Description: +10 to 'Mountain Dew Resistance.' Never washed. Never will be. Crusty with Dorito dust.

Title: The Robe Awakens
Description: The Force is strong with this one. Can sense disturbances in the blockchain. Dry clean only — which is why it's never been dry cleaned.

Title: Dreamhouse Owner
Description: Just Ken. That's it. No horse. No Barbie. Just vibes, this jacket, and a persistent sense that he's in the background of someone else's story.

Title: The Perpetual Pre-Workout
Description: Reduces 'Fatigue' debuff. Perfect for late-night questing or cramming for exams. Has never been worn outside.

Title: The Unencumbered
Description: Agility +15 and 'Swim Speed' +20 (no water resistance). -50 'Social Acceptance.' You have chosen to face the world as you entered it: screaming and with zero defense. Aggros all city guards.

Title: "I'm Not Cold, You're Cold"
Description: Nobody knows what's actually happening underneath all that polyester and fluff.

Title: Cannon Fodder
Description: Statistically speaking, you are background character #4. Do not engage the main villain. Do not form emotional bonds. Your role is to fall first.

Title: The Based Signal
Description: Periodically causes nearby NPCs to emit a 'kek' sound. Wearing this either makes you Based™ or unemployable. No middle ground exists.

Title: The Grape Ape Jacket
Description: Grants the ability to summon a rain of purple. Also attracts royalty, bruises, and people who say 'purple is actually a rare color in nature.'

Title: The Expendable
Description: If you've seen any sci-fi, you know exactly what this means. -100 to 'Survival Probability.' The universe has already decided. You just haven't been informed yet.

Title: Emperor's Gown
Description: +10 to 'Oratory' and 'Leadership' when addressing crowds. Requires careful draping.

Title: Ponzi Scheme Attire
Description: +25 to 'LinkedIn Engagement.' Grants ability to convince people your NFT project has 'utility.' Comes pre-stained with cocaine and regret.

Title: Overcorrection Gear
Description: Technically overkill. Practically speaking, same. Full tactical loadout for a man who has never once been in a tactical situation. The Discord mods are not a threat.

Title: Bicep Billboard
Description: Arms: visible. Sunscreen: optional. Opinions: loud. Can be found at any gym, barbecue, or venue with a two-drink minimum. Fights optional but likely.

Title: Business Casual (Other Business)
Description: Nobody asks questions. Nobody makes eye contact. +20 to 'Plausible Deniability.' Pockets: many. Contents: undisclosed. Warranty: void.

Title: The "I Can't Find My Sleeves" Coat
Description: Technically a coat. Functionally a blanket with aspirations. Perfect for people who gave up halfway through getting dressed and called it fashion.

Title: Snowman Simulator Suit
Description: +15 to 'Arctic Appropriateness.' Camouflages you in snow. And cocaine.

Title: The Prison-Break Casual
Description: Either fashion-forward or recently paroled. No context clues provided. The stripes are doing a lot of work here. Background check: pending.

Title: Arm Day, Every Day
Description: Left arm is a weapon. Right arm is jealous. Wipes memory between sets. Still won't skip leg day. The conditioning is complete. The trauma is a feature.

Title: Itchy Investment Garment
Description: +10 to 'Rustic Cosplay.' Smells like wet dog. Attracts sheep and sustainability influencers. Comfort level: Punishment.

Title: Puddle Jumper
Description: Immune to 'Wet' debuff. Increases 'Splash Attack' damage.

Title: Sprinter's Speedy Shell
Description: +20 to 'Running Away.' High visibility means everyone watches you flee. Can't hide. Can't fight. Can run though.

Title: High Visibility Liability
Description: +40 to 'Being Spotted.' Perfect for getting sniped first in every engagement. Stealth missions are not your calling.

Title: The Red Flag Detector
Description: Sees through deception, half-truths, and motivational posters. Cannot be deceived. Cannot be charmed. Has heard every pitch. Is not impressed.

Title: The "Everything is Fine" Filter
Description: Passive ability: ignores all red flags. Cannot read the room. Grants +30 to 'Delusion' and a permanent sense that this time it'll be different.

Title: Adderall's Aftermath
Description: +30 to 'Productivity,' -50 to 'Sanity.' Powered by prescription abuse and poor choices. Heart rate: Concerning. Parents: Disappointed.

Title: The Standard Gaze
Description: Two eyes. Standard configuration. Nothing suspicious here. Blinks at regular intervals. TOTALLY normal. Please do not investigate further.

Title: Cyclops or birth defect?
Description: -50% 'Depth Perception.' +40 'Intimidation.' Either a tragic origin story or a genetic quirk. The patch costs extra. The eye does not.

Title: The 1% Battery Indicators
Description: +10 to 'Relatability,' -20 to 'Productivity.' Powered by caffeine and capitalism. Sleep schedule: Fictional. Will: Broken.

Title: Pinpricks of Judgment
Description: +10 to 'Skepticism,' +5 to 'Unimpressed Glaring.' Used by teachers and tired parents to convey silent disappointment across great distances.

Title: The "HMMM" High-Beams
Description: The suspicious glare you give when the "math isn't mathing."

Title: I'll Be Back
Description: Cannot be stopped. Cannot be reasoned with. Absolutely will not negotiate. Here to terminate your floor price. Hasta la vista, liquidity.

Title: "Wait, What?"
Description: Permanent state of mild horror. Has seen too much. Processes 20% less than average. Still somehow surprised every single time.

Title: Depth Perception? Never Heard of Her
Description: Perfect for watching things that weren't filmed in 3D. Makes everything look slightly broken and headache-inducing. A metaphor, arguably.

Title: The Glass-Cannon Gadget
Description: Always reads "Over 9000" regardless of actual value. Broken since launch. Still more accurate than TA traders.

Title: The Naptime Professional
Description: Full blackout. Zero awareness. Perfect for people whose strategy is literally just waiting it out. Not dead. Just resting. Until the price recovers. It won't.

Title: +10 to Intimidation, -50% to Depth Perception.
Description: Forged in dim taverns by sailors who saw too much... and decided one eye was enough.

Title: The Perspective Problem
Description: Vision: two-dimensional. World: also now two-dimensional. Cannot perceive depth, nuance, or that maybe you should diversify your portfolio. Sees only one angle. Commits fully.

Title: Infinity Frames
Description: Sees six eyes where others see two. Grants 'Limitless' ability and the personality of someone who knows they're the strongest in the room and refuses to stop mentioning it.

Title: Crypto Bro's Clarity Lenses
Description: Everything looks like gains. Red candles look like buying opportunities. Scam projects look like early alpha. A cursed item disguised as a luxury flex.

Title: Rich Asshole Radius Detector
Description: +20 to 'Insufferable Snobbery.' Everything you own is "vintage" and "artisanal." Everyone you meet is beneath you.

Title: The Overkill Optics
Description: Allows you to see enemy weaknesses with a faint red glow. May occasionally fire small, harmless lasers.

Title: The "Ackchyually" Accessory
Description: Can explain blockchain to disinterested strangers for hours. Dating success rate: 0.001%.

Title: The Unshielded Gaze
Description: Just two delicate spheres, completely exposed. +20% vulnerability to awkward eye contact and sand.

Title: The "I Won the Argument" Shades
Description: Worn exclusively at the moment of victory. Dropped from above, cinematically, before delivering the final line. You've been practicing this. It shows.

Title: $3,500 Mistake Manifestor
Description: Perfect for watching your portfolio crash in 4K spatial computing. May occasionally display pop-up ads for hot singles near you.

Title: +100 to Fashion Over Function.
Description: Can't see shit. Looks cool doing it.

Title: The Crown of Volume
Description: +30 to 'Presence.' Cannot be ignored. Cannot be minimized. Defies gravity as a personality trait. Atmospheric.

Title: Halo of Questionable Intent
Description: Glows faintly in the presence of sinners and cheap ale. God sees your browser history.

Title: +15 to 'Desert Survival,' -25 to 'Airport Security Clearance.'
Description: Grants 'Sand Resistance' passive. Excellent for long journeys and dramatic reveals. Flaps impressively in the wind.

Title: Simulation Veteran
Description: Perfect for those who served in Modern Warfare 2. Zero transferable real-world skills. But the callsign was sick.

Title: The Self-Inflicted Buff
Description: +20 to Intimidation, but -1 to Intelligence. Requires frequent bandages.

Title: The Reverse Intellectual
Description: +10 to 'Skate Park Cred.' -10 to 'Parental Approval.' The brim still works. He just chose not to use it. A metaphor for his entire approach to life.

Title: The Renegade Napkin
Description: Multipurpose. Face covering, sweatband, flag, hostage negotiation prop. Does not grant any actual abilities. Looks capable though. That's enough.

Title: +10 to Approachability, -5 to Commitment.
Description: A golden hue that couldn't decide whether to shine or sulk. Great for bros who "used to surf once."

Title: The Golden Mane
Description: +10 to 'Charisma' but -5 to 'Stealth' (it really shines).

Title: The Cobalt Canopy
Description: A sophisticated way to say you're wearing a primary color as a personality trait.

Title: The UPS Special
Description: Blends in perfectly with crowds of people wearing brown, offering a slight 'Brown Crowd Camouflage' bonus.

Title: The Fisherman
Description: The only thing ever caught is a cold.

Title: Floof Daggers
Description: +10 to 'UwU Energy.'

Title: The Raiden
Description: Grants 'Lightning Redirection' passive. Excellent for outdoor events and standing dramatically in rain. Very aerodynamic. Surprisingly load-bearing.

Title: Yee Yee
Description: Has never ridden a horse. Has strong opinions about the frontier. Listens exclusively to country music and market cap analysis. This is the way.

Title: The Royal Pain
Description: +50 to 'Demanding Respect.' Born with it or bought it — the crown doesn't care. Neither does he. Passive ability: assumes the room is already his.

Title: The Charlie Chaplin Cap
Description: Increases your chances of being mistaken for a 'Very Important Person.'

Title: Complimentary Accessories
Description: Came with the deal. Non-refundable. +20 to 'Temptation Aura.' Nobody reads the fine print until it's far too late.

Title: +100 to Intimidation against peasants.
Description: Periodically whispers dark suggestions. Will not stop until you've restructured the entire kingdom in its image.

Title: The Merchant's Topper
Description: Occasionally conjures small, insignificant trinkets for sale. Impresses desert traders.

Title: Boomer Brim
Description: +15 to 'Complaining About Youth.' Mandatory for explaining how things were better before. They weren't.

Title: The High-and-Tight
Description: Requires a level and protractor to maintain. Your barber is either 60 or military. Tolerance: ±0.5mm. Respect: earned.

Title: The Background Character
Description: +8 to 'Loitering Convincingly.' Perfect for eavesdropping. Terrible for employment. Shower status: Overdue.

Title: It's Not Easy Being Rich
Description: Increases gold drops from defeated enemies. Also attracts squirrels. And the IRS.

Title: The Aspirational Sweatband
Description: +3 to 'Athletic Appearance.' Actual athletic ability not included. Wears it to the gym. Skips leg day.

Title: +30 to Ignoring Reality.
Description: May or may not have music playing. Definitely ignoring your problems either way.

Title: The Billionaire Cosplay
Description: Grants 'Suit Protocol' ability. Requires jarvis. Requires arc reactor. Requires being a billionaire genius. Two of those are not available. The helmet is though.

Title: The Muppet Manager
Description: Grants ability to sip tea judgmentally while society collapses. Sometimes the hat whispers bad financial advice.

Title: +20 to Shade, -10 to Productivity.
Description: Perfect for avoiding responsibility under the guise of culture. Nap time is sacred.

Title: Litigation Launcher 3000
Description: +15 to 'Brand Recognition,' +100 to 'Legal Threats.' Wearing this summons attorneys faster than saying 'fair use' three times in a mirror.

Title: The Village Dropout
Description: +10 to 'Running Speed' (with arms flailing behind). Allows user to speak in 'Dattebayo' dialect.

Title: Lightbulb of Inspiration
Description: Granted 'Eureka' ability once per session. Idea quality: unverified. Patent: not filed. VC meeting: cold emailed. Ghosted.

Title: The Cranial Nudist
Description: All critical hits received are automatically headshots. Grants 'Unobstructed Thinking' but has a 10% chance to attract a Pigeon.

Title: The Vintage Deterioration
Description: +5 to 'Senility.' Found in garage. Or maybe attic. Can't remember.

Title: Evil Knieval Stunt Double
Description: Worn by someone who calculated the risk and said 'probably fine.' It was not fine. He did it anyway. Twice.

Title: Gang Affiliation Accessory
Description: +5 to 'Street Cred.' -50 to 'Life Expectancy.' Trevor, your suburb doesn't count as a territory. Calm down.

Title: The Sundance Reject
Description: Grants access to vinyl record discussions and a chance to discover hidden coffee shops. Your screenplay will never get made.

Title: The Ushanka Situation
Description: +20 to 'Cold Resistance,' +30 to 'Vodka Tolerance.' In Soviet Russia, hat wears you. To grave.

Title: OSHA's Chosen One
Description: Prevents brain damage, but can't prevent the brain damage you already have from buying jpegs. Hi-vis vest sold separately.

Title: Apex Accessory
Description: +30 to 'Open Water Intimidation.' -20 to 'Being Taken Seriously On Land.' Passive: attracts everyone at the party who 'loves sharks.' You made a terrible mistake.

Title: Jurisdiction: Unclear
Description: Can deputize nearby NPCs for a limited time. May accidentally start a saloon brawl. (Is this actually a shower cap?)

Title: The "Used Car Salesman" Special
Description: Uses more gel than shampoo. Personality is also slippery. Trust fund probable.

Title: THIS. IS. LIQUIDATION.
Description: 300 warriors. One mission. Zero exit strategy. +50 to 'Dying Gloriously.' -100 to 'Tactical Retreat.' Abs mandatory. Helmet decorative.

Title: The Identity Crisis Cowlick
Description: Half one thing. Half another. Won't commit to either. Internally conflicted. Externally: symmetrical. Therapy: scheduled.

Title: The Monopoly Man's Crown
Description: +15 to 'Deception' and 'High Society Haggling.' Comes with the unshakeable belief that other people's problems are simply a failure of ambition.

Title: The Drinking Buddy
Description: +15 to 'Roar' skill. May accidentally summon a sea serpent during a storm.

Title: The Thinking Cap
Description: +40 to 'Spell Power.' Still can't impress a woman.

Title: Whiskers of Wisdom & War
Description: +15 to 'Gravitas.' Contains crumbs from at least three meals. May harbor small woodland creatures. Women find it either irresistible or deeply concerning. No middle ground.

Title: Porn Stache of Power
Description: +15 to 'Charm' against maidens and old ladies. Requires daily maintenance and questionable decisions. Popular in the 70s and at dive bars.

Title: The Slow Debuff
Description: Grants temporary 'Calm' effect, but applies 'Lung Debuff' over time.

Title: Chemical Bro-fare
Description: Immune to Poison Gas (farts) and Smog debuffs. Impedes communication slightly.

Title: The Minty Mystery
Description: Periodically grants a minor, random buff (e.g., 'Minty Fresh Breath', 'Sticky Situation Escape').

Title: The Chin Curtain
Description: Just below the jaw. Very specific choice. Signals either 'I read Dostoevsky' or 'I sold a water softener to your dad.' No way to know which until it's too late.

Title: The Antisocial Upgrade
Description: Removes obligation to smile at strangers. Grants 'Mystery' passive and a +10 bonus to 'People Assuming You're Interesting.' You're not. But they don't know that.

Title: The 'Stache Standard
Description: Grants 'Instant Authority' passive. Implies either a deep commitment to the bit or a complete absence of self-awareness. Possibly both. Probably both.

Title: The Identity Protector
Description: Designed to ensure that anyone who sees you won't recognize you later — mostly because they'll be too busy wondering why you're wearing a ninja mask in a Starbucks.

Title: The Unfiltered Yap
Description: +10 'Noise Pollution'. A basic model pie-hole for calories and unfiltered opinions. Passive ability: 'Accidental Insult' (10% chance on all dialogue).

Title: Sage of Questionable Wisdom
Description: +20 to 'Unsolicited Life Advice.' Every sentence starts with "Back in my day." Isn't allowed near schools.

Title: Demonic Disguise
Description: +40 to 'Terrifying Presence.' Culturally complex. Functionally alarming. Makes HR very uncomfortable. Annual review: pending. Mask: non-negotiable.

Title: +15 to Bite Damage, -20 to Enunciation.
Description: Orthodontist refuses your calls. Speech impediment adds character.

Title: +5 to Pretentious Pondering.
Description: Releases carcinogens and unwanted opinions.

Title: The Copium Grin
Description: +5 to 'Copium Inhalation.' Still smiling while portfolio is -90%. Nobody knows if enlightened or lobotomized.

Title: Bodily Expression of Market Conditions
Description: AOE damage to all nearby holders. Debuff intensifies during rug pulls and gas fee spikes. Cleanse requires touching grass.

Title: The Eternal Bag Holder
Description: Has been alive for 900 years. Still bagholding. Cannot die. Cannot sell. The stake through the heart would be mercy compared to another -40% weekly candle.
